raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Geasus bija wiꞥſch
Preeſchâ nogahjs/ un to Sisli
us ta Puifcha Waiqu lizzis/ bet
tur ne bija Balfs neds Jufcha-
nas. Tad greesehs wiꞥſch at-
pakſt tam pretti/ un fluddina-
ja tam/ fazzidams: Tas Puifis
ne irr uſmohdees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu Elisus Nammâ
nahze/ rangi/ tad bija tas Behrns
nomirris us winna Gultu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch gahje eekſcha/
un atsflehdsê tahs Durwis
preekſch abbeem/ un peeluhdsê to
KUNGII.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch uskahpe/ un
apgullehs us to Behrnu/ un likte
fawu Mutti us winna Mutti/
un fawas Azzis us winna Az-
zim/ un fawas Rohkas us win-
na Rohkahm / un isplettehs ta
pahr ta Behrna Meeſahm / tee-
kains tahs faſille.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch zchlehs atkaſ/
un gahje Nammâ weenkahrt
ſchurp un turp / un uskahpe at-
kaſ/ un isplettehs pahr wiꞥſu.
Tad fhkaudtja tas Puifis feptix
reisi/ pehz atdarrija tas Puifis
fawas Azzis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad aizinaja wiꞥſch Ge-
asu/ un fazzija: Aizina man fcho
Sunamiterei. Un kad wiꞥſch
to aizinaja/ nahze winna pee ta/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nahze ta/ un met-
tehs wiꞥſnam aptabrt Kahjahm/
un paſlanntjahs pee Semmes/
un ta pazehle fawu Dchlu / un
iſgahje ahra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Elisus atkaſ us
Gilgalu nahze / tad bija Bads
tai Semmê/ un to Praweeschn
Behrnt tehdeja winna Preek-
ſchâ/ un wiꞥſch fazztja us fawu
Puifi: Leez to leeſu Pohdn klaht/
un wahri Putru preekſch teem
Praweeschn Behrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad iſgahje weens Lau-
ka Sahles laſſiht / un atradde
Metcha-Gurku Stihgas/ un laſ-
fija no tahm fawu Drehyt pillu
ar ruhktahm Sahlehm/ un nah-
ze/ un greese tahs eekſch Pohda
pee Putras/ jo wiꞥſch tahs ne
pasinne.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tee to preekſch teem
Wibreem islehje ehſt / un tee no
tahs Putras ehde/ tad fauze tec/
un fazztja: Ta Nahwe irr tah
Pohdâ/ tu Deewa Wihrs/ un ne
warreja to ehſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 41,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet wiꞥſch fazzija: At-
nesſeet Militus. Un wiꞥſch mette
tohs eekſch Pohda/ un wiꞥſch faz-
zija: Isleij teem Landin/ ka tee
ehſt/ tad ne bija wairs ne kahds
Launuuns Pohda.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 42,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un weens Wihrs nahze
no Baal Saltsas / un atneffe
tamDeewa Wihrum jaunas Lab-
bibas Matses/ diwideſmits Mec-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
